title: List A: List of Certain Natural Health Products for Distribution as Samples - Canada.ca
content:
## List A: List of Certain Natural Health Products for Distribution as Samples
The solidus (/) in column 6 indicates that the terms and/or the statements are synonymous. Either term or statement may be included on the label by the market authorization holder. Text in parentheses in column 6 is additional optional information which can also be added to the label at the market authorization holder's discretion.
Column 1 Class of Natural Health Products
Column 2 Medicinal Ingredient(s)
Column 3 Quantity of Medicinal Ingredient(s)
Column 4 Qualifier (s)
Column 5 Route(s) of Administration
Column 6 Permissible Use(s) or Purpose(s)
Dental, Gingival, Periodontal
Anti-cavity/Anti-caries Prevents, fights and/or protects against cavities/caries Reduces the incidence of cavities/caries Helps prevent tooth decay Effective fluoride protection Effective decay preventive fluoride Protects teeth from acid wear/erosion Helps delay/ slow the tooth decay process at the earliest stage before it can become a cavity Penetrates tooth enamel to help rebuild weak spots Helps remineralize tooth enamel Helps reduce (painful) sensitivity of the teeth (due)(to) (cold)/ (heat)/ (acids)/ (sweets)/ (contact) Builds protection/ Protects from (painful) sensitivity of the teeth (due)(to) (cold)/ (heat)/ (acids)/ (sweets)/ (contact) (Builds)(Effective) Protection against (painful) sensitivity of the teeth (due)(to) (cold)/ (heat)/ (acids)/ (sweets)/ (contact) Shields/soothes dental nerves for lasting sensitivity relief when used regularly
- Anti-cavity/Anti-caries
- Prevents, fights and/or protects against cavities/caries
- Reduces the incidence of cavities/caries
- Helps prevent tooth decay
- Effective fluoride protection
- Effective decay preventive fluoride
- Protects teeth from acid wear/erosion
- Helps delay/ slow the tooth decay process at the earliest stage before it can become a cavity
- Penetrates tooth enamel to help rebuild weak spots
- Helps remineralize tooth enamel
- Helps reduce (painful) sensitivity of the teeth (due)(to) (cold)/ (heat)/ (acids)/ (sweets)/ (contact)
- Builds protection/ Protects from (painful) sensitivity of the teeth (due)(to) (cold)/ (heat)/ (acids)/ (sweets)/ (contact)
- (Builds)(Effective) Protection against (painful) sensitivity of the teeth (due)(to) (cold)/ (heat)/ (acids)/ (sweets)/ (contact)
- Shields/soothes dental nerves for lasting sensitivity relief when used regularly
Sodium monofluorophosphate
Acidulated phosphate fluoride

Personal Care Use Antiseptic Skin Cleansers
Antiseptic (skin) cleanser Medicated (skin) cleanser Antibacterial (skin) cleanser Kills harmful bacteria/germs Effective in destroying (harmful) bacteria to provide antiseptic cleansing For personal hand hygiene to help prevent the spread of bacteria
- Antiseptic (skin) cleanser
- Medicated (skin) cleanser
- Antibacterial (skin) cleanser
- Kills harmful bacteria/germs
- Effective in destroying (harmful) bacteria to provide antiseptic cleansing
- For personal hand hygiene to help prevent the spread of bacteria
The Sun Protection Factor (SPF) must be ≥2 and values greater than 50 must be declared as SPF 50+
Sun Protection Factor "X" / SPF "X" Helps prevent sunburn Sunscreen Sunburn protectant Helps protect from sunburn Broad spectrum (Sun Protection Factor "X" / SPF "X") Filters/Screens UVA/UVB rays Absorbs throughout the UVA/UVB spectrum to provide sunburn protection UVA/UVB protection Water/Sweat Resistant [40 minutes / 80 minutes]
- Sun Protection Factor "X" / SPF "X"
- Helps prevent sunburn
- Helps protect from sunburn
- Broad spectrum (Sun Protection Factor "X" / SPF "X")
- Filters/Screens UVA/UVB rays
- Absorbs throughout the UVA/UVB spectrum to provide sunburn protection
- Water/Sweat Resistant [40 minutes / 80 minutes]
Anti-Dandruff Products
(For the relief of) / (Controls) / (Helps prevent) / (Helps prevent [the] recurrence of) / (Reduces [the] recurrence of) / (Reduces) dandruff / (and) (the symptoms of) ([skin / scalp] itching / irritation / redness / flaking [and]/ scaling) (associated with dandruff)
- (For the relief of) / (Controls) / (Helps prevent) / (Helps prevent [the] recurrence of) / (Reduces [the] recurrence of) / (Reduces) dandruff / (and) (the symptoms of) ([skin / scalp] itching / irritation / redness / flaking [and]/ scaling) (associated with dandruff)
Diaper Rash Products
Helps prevent diaper rash Protects chafed skin due to diaper rash Helps protect from wetness that causes diaper rash Temporarily protects and helps relieve minor skin irritation due to diaper rash Helps treat/ heal diaper rash
- Helps prevent diaper rash
- Protects chafed skin due to diaper rash
- Helps protect from wetness that causes diaper rash
- Temporarily protects and helps relieve minor skin irritation due to diaper rash
- Helps treat/ heal diaper rash
Medicated Skin Care Products
Temporarily protects and helps relieve minor skin irritation and itching Temporarily protects and helps relieve minor skin irritation and itching due to minor cuts, scrapes and burns Temporarily dries the oozing and weeping and helps relieve minor skin irritation and itching due to poison ivy/oak/sumac Temporarily protects and helps relieve minor skin irritation and itching due to rashes, eczema, poison ivy/oak/sumac, and insect bites
- Temporarily protects and helps relieve minor skin irritation and itching
- Temporarily protects and helps relieve minor skin irritation and itching due to minor cuts, scrapes and burns
- Temporarily dries the oozing and weeping and helps relieve minor skin irritation and itching due to poison ivy/oak/sumac
- Temporarily protects and helps relieve minor skin irritation and itching due to rashes, eczema, poison ivy/oak/sumac, and insect bites
Acne Therapy Products
For the treatment/management of acne Helps treat acne pimples (and allows skin to heal) Dries and helps clear up acne pimples (and allows skin to heal) Reduces the number and/or severity of acne pimples (and allow skin to heal) Penetrates pores to control/ reduce acne pimples Helps keep skin clear of new acne pimples Helps prevent new acne pimples from forming Acne treatment Helps prevent acne Helps prevent acne pimples Helps clear acne Acne treatment/medication Helps treat acne/pimples Reduces the number of pimples
- For the treatment/management of acne
- Helps treat acne pimples (and allows skin to heal)
- Dries and helps clear up acne pimples (and allows skin to heal)
- Reduces the number and/or severity of acne pimples (and allow skin to heal)
- Penetrates pores to control/ reduce acne pimples
- Helps keep skin clear of new acne pimples
- Helps prevent new acne pimples from forming
- Helps prevent acne pimples
- Acne treatment/medication
- Helps treat acne/pimples
- Reduces the number of pimples
Resorcinol monoacetate
100 - 500 mg per lozenge
For the temporary relief of (minor) sore throat For temporary relief of pain of (minor) sore throat For the protection of irritated area in throat Helps ease/relieve nasal congestion Makes nasal passages feel clearer For the temporary relief of coughs Antiseptic
- For the temporary relief of (minor) sore throat
- For temporary relief of pain of (minor) sore throat
- For the protection of irritated area in throat
- Helps ease/relieve nasal congestion
- Makes nasal passages feel clearer
- For the temporary relief of coughs
2 - 15 mg per lozenge
50 – 100 mg per lozenge
2 – 20 mg per lozenge
2 – 20 mg per lozenge
10 – 50 mg per lozenge
10 – 15% per lozenge
Eucalyptus essential oil
0.2-15 mg per lozenge
Athlete's Foot Treatments
For the treatment of athlete's foot Cures athlete's foot Kills athlete's foot fungus Relieves (itching, scaling, burning, cracking, redness, soreness, irritation) of athlete's foot
- For the treatment of athlete's foot
- Cures athlete's foot
- Kills athlete's foot fungus
- Relieves (itching, scaling, burning, cracking, redness, soreness, irritation) of athlete's foot
